message:
Fix CI: install binaryen via apt instead of npm wasm-opt wrapper

The wasm-opt npm package downloads a binary on postinstall which
bun skips. Use system binaryen package instead — more reliable.

files.patch:
@@ -20,6 +20,9 @@ jobs:
         with:
           version: 0.15.2
 
+      - name: Install binaryen (wasm-opt)
+        run: sudo apt-get install -y binaryen
+
       - name: Install
         run: bun install
 
@@ -43,6 +46,9 @@ jobs:
         with:
           version: 0.15.2
 
+      - name: Install binaryen (wasm-opt)
+        run: sudo apt-get install -y binaryen
+
       - name: Install
         run: bun install
